recommendedNextGate: Implement and locally test a LayerZero V2 IGlyphMessengerAdapter candidate in a separate implementation phase; do not deploy/sign/broadcast until explicit approval.

providers.name: LayerZero V2

officialEvidence.quote: base-sepolia nativeChainId 84532 chainStatus ACTIVE deployment version 2 eid 40245 endpointV2 0x6EDCE65403992e310A62460808c4b910D972f10f; monad-testnet nativeChainId 10143 chainStatus ACTIVE deployment version 2 eid 40204 endpointV2 0x6C7Ab2202C98C4227C5c46f1417D81144DA716Ff
LayerZero is an omnichain interoperability protocol that provides a stable, immutable interface for crosschain messaging.
applications can define any custom data as bytes and send them as crosschain messages

providers.sourceAuthenticationModel: OApp sends through EndpointV2 with configured send library/DVNs/executor options; source message emits LayerZero GUID/nonce.
providers.destinationAuthenticationModel: Destination OApp receives through EndpointV2 and must validate trusted endpoint, Origin.srcEid, trusted remote peer/source application, destination app, schema version/type, GUID/messageId, and payload hash.
providers.finalityAssumptions: Depends on selected LayerZero DVN confirmations/finality and executor delivery configuration. Must be recorded in messengerPolicyHash and proof must be classified AUTHENTICATED_ADAPTER, not LIGHT_CLIENT_VERIFIED.
providers.replayMessageIdGuarantees: LayerZero MessagingReceipt includes bytes32 guid and uint64 nonce; Glyph adapter must map GUID or a domain-separated GUID/nonce hash to messageId and enforce consumed messageId plus consumed (operationId,messageType,routeNonce).
providers.testnetAvailability: Official active testnet deployments for both endpoints.
providers.liquidityProviderDependencies: None for transport; Glyph still needs its own destination liquidity/provider model.
implementationRequirements: bind Base Sepolia chainId 84532/EID 40245 and Monad Testnet chainId 10143/EID 40204
bind EndpointV2 addresses and trusted peers
map LayerZero GUID to Glyph messageId
fail closed on wrong endpoint, EID, peer, destination app, message version/type, or payload hash
store consumed message IDs and consumed (operationId,messageType,routeNonce)
add adversarial local tests before any public testnet proof

providers.name: Hyperlane

officialEvidence.quote: Hyperlane is the first permissionless interoperability layer that allows smart contract developers to send arbitrary data between blockchains.

providers.sourceAuthenticationModel: Mailbox dispatch emits message; relayer delivers metadata/message.
providers.destinationAuthenticationModel: Destination Mailbox consults recipient ISM verify(metadata,message) before handle(origin,sender,body).
providers.finalityAssumptions: ISM/validator/relayer dependent; unavailable because Monad Testnet registry status is disabled.
providers.replayMessageIdGuarantees: Hyperlane messages are Mailbox messages; Glyph would still need messageId/semantic replay storage.
providers.testnetAvailability: Base Sepolia available; Monad Testnet disabled/deprecated in official registry.
providers.liquidityProviderDependencies: None for messaging; transport disabled for destination.

providers.name: Wormhole

officialEvidence.quote: base_sepolia: 10004 is present; no monad or monad_testnet entry was found in the checked official constants.

providers.destinationAuthenticationModel: VAA verification where supported; no exact Monad Testnet endpoint found.
providers.finalityAssumptions: Guardian observation/finality dependent; not evaluated for exact lane because destination unsupported.
providers.replayMessageIdGuarantees: VAA/emitter sequence can be mapped when supported; no exact lane.
providers.testnetAvailability: Base Sepolia listed; Monad Testnet not found.
providers.liquidityProviderDependencies: None for core messaging where supported.

providers.name: Axelar

officialEvidence.quote: Fetched official page contained Gateway/Gas Service data but no matches for Monad, Base Sepolia, 10143, or 84532.
Fetched official page contained Gateway/Gas Service data but no matches for Monad, Base Sepolia, 10143, or 84532.

providers.destinationAuthenticationModel: Axelar Gateway validates approved contract call where chain supported.
providers.finalityAssumptions: Axelar validator/GMP dependent; not applicable to unsupported exact endpoints.
providers.replayMessageIdGuarantees: Axelar command/contract-call IDs where supported; no exact lane.

providers.name: Chainlink CCIP
providers.subVerdict: VERIFIED_SUPPORTED for one-way outbound Base Sepolia -> Monad Testnet; INCONCLUSIVE for full Glyph source-finalization because reverse Monad Testnet -> Base Sepolia acknowledgement lane was not found in visible directory data.

officialEvidence.quote: Base Sepolia page contains source Base Sepolia, destination Monad Testnet, onRamp 0x28A025d34c830BF212f5D2357C8DcAB32dD92A20, offRamp 0xF4EbCC2c077d3939434C7Ab0572660c5A45e4df5, version 1.6.0.
Monad Testnet chain data includes router 0x5aD0A67f4Da0E8665a3fbf15E4215A780407Cf33 and chainSelector 2183018362218727504.

providers.sourceAuthenticationModel: CCIP Router/onRamp accepts EVM2Any messages on source lane.
providers.destinationAuthenticationModel: CCIP offRamp/router delivers to receiver on destination lane; receiver must validate CCIP sender/source selector and messageId.
providers.finalityAssumptions: CCIP lane security/RMN/commit-execution dependent; proof class should be AUTHENTICATED_ADAPTER.
providers.replayMessageIdGuarantees: CCIP messageId can map to Glyph messageId; Glyph still needs consumed messageId and semantic nonce storage.
providers.testnetAvailability: Exact outbound lane visible in official testnet directory.
providers.liquidityProviderDependencies: None for data messages; token-transfer lanes/tokens are separate and not required for Glyph messaging. Destination liquidity remains Glyph/provider-owned.
providers.blockerToUseAsPrimary: Verify reverse Monad Testnet -> Base Sepolia lane or get an approved alternate authenticated destination-acknowledgement path.

providers.name: deBridge / DLN

officialEvidence.quote: Official API response did not include chainId 84532 or chainId 10143.

providers.sourceAuthenticationModel: DLN/order infrastructure, not accepted as arbitrary-message authentication here.

providers.name: LI.FI

officialEvidence.quote: Base Sepolia Testnet id 84532 listed; Monad id 143 listed; no Monad Testnet id 10143 entry found.

providers.sourceAuthenticationModel: Route aggregator, not an arbitrary-message authentication layer.
providers.finalityAssumptions: Bridge/solver-route dependent; not applicable to adapter semantics.
providers.testnetAvailability: Base Sepolia only; Monad Testnet absent.
providers.liquidityProviderDependencies: Requires bridge/DEX/liquidity providers for token routes.

providers.name: Relay

officialEvidence.quote: Relay API lists Monad mainnet id 143 but no id 84532 and no id 10143.

providers.sourceAuthenticationModel: Solver/liquidity routing API, not arbitrary-message authentication.
providers.testnetAvailability: No exact Base Sepolia or Monad Testnet support found.

rpcReadback.proves: Both official EndpointV2 addresses currently have runtime bytecode on the expected chains.
rpcReadback.doesNotProve: Configured OApp peers, compatible DVN/executor policy, fee quoting, or a successful bidirectional application message.

explicitUnknowns: LayerZero DVN confirmation policy, executor gas options, OApp peers, enforced options, and fee quoting still require implementation-phase verification.
Chainlink CCIP reverse Monad Testnet -> Base Sepolia acknowledgement lane was not found in visible directory data.
No private support channels or non-public registries were queried.
No live public OApp send, destination execution, or authenticated return acknowledgement has been performed.
